--- title: "Livestock Section" section: livestock updated: 2026-02-25 --- ## 🐄 Livestock Update ### Beef - Prices strong at £4.25/kg - Good demand for R4L grade ### Sheep - Lamb prices up to £2.85/kg - Spring lambing season approaching ### Key Tasks - Check all livestock housing - Order spring minerals
